type.description: The access token issued by the authorization server.

username.description: The user who requested the access_token

application_name.description: The application which is requested the access_token

client_id.description: The client_id is a public identifier for apps

token_type.description: token_type is a parameter in Access Token generate call to Authorization server, which essentially represents how an access_token will be generated and presented for resource access calls

access_token.description: Access tokens are a String which applications use to make API requests on behalf of a user.

expires_in.description: The lifetime in seconds of the access token

scope.description: Scope is a mechanism in OAuth 2.0 to limit an application's access to a user's account
